name: Hot Buttered Cider with Ginger & Cinnamon
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sliced Candied or Crystallized Ginger
1 Stick Butter, Cut into Thin Slices
recipeInstructions:
Warm yourself with this fragrantly spiced, nonalcoholic beverage after a frosty night of caroling.
1. In a large, non-aluminum saucepan, mix the water and granulated sugar. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
2. Remove from the heat and stir in the whole cloves, whole allspice, cinnamon sticks, and sliced ginger. Let the mixture stand for at least 1 hour or longer.
3. Strain the mixture into a bowl and return it to the saucepan. Stir in the apple cider, orange juice, and lemon juice.
4. Serve hot in mugs with a slice of butter on top and a cinnamon stick.
